XMLDB.COMMENT: XMLDB schema for the qtype_accounting (Accounting Entry / Buchungssatz) question type.

TABLE.NAME: qtype_accounting_options
TABLE.COMMENT: Per-question settings: chart selection, decoy count, number format, grading flags.

FIELD.NAME: questionid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key references question.id

FIELD.NAME: chartofaccountsid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key references qtype_accounting_charts.id

FIELD.NAME: accountsindropdown
FIELD.COMMENT: Number of decoy accounts shown in dropdowns alongside correct ones (0 = show entire chart)

FIELD.NAME: numberformat
FIELD.COMMENT: Display number format: de (1.234,56) or us (1,234.56)

FIELD.NAME: extraentrydeduction
FIELD.COMMENT: Fraction (0.0 to 1.0) deducted per extra account named that is not in the correct answer

FIELD.NAME: allornothinggrading
FIELD.COMMENT: If 1, the question grades 0 or full marks only (no partial credit)

FIELD.NAME: allowmultipleentries
FIELD.COMMENT: If 1, students may submit multiple booking entries (compound bookings)

FIELD.NAME: maxentries
FIELD.COMMENT: Maximum number of entries the student may add per question

TABLE.NAME: qtype_accounting_entries
TABLE.COMMENT: Correct-answer rows for accounting entry questions; one row per journal entry, with per-field weights.

FIELD.NAME: questionid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key references question.id

FIELD.NAME: sortorder
FIELD.COMMENT: Display order of the entry within the question

FIELD.NAME: debitaccountid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key references qtype_accounting_accounts.id (debit side)

FIELD.NAME: debitamount
FIELD.COMMENT: Debit amount

FIELD.NAME: creditaccountid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key references qtype_accounting_accounts.id (credit side)

FIELD.NAME: creditamount
FIELD.COMMENT: Credit amount

FIELD.NAME: weight_debitaccount
FIELD.COMMENT: Grading weight for the debit account (1-3)

FIELD.NAME: weight_debitamount
FIELD.COMMENT: Grading weight for the debit amount (1-3)

FIELD.NAME: weight_creditaccount
FIELD.COMMENT: Grading weight for the credit account (1-3)

FIELD.NAME: weight_creditamount
FIELD.COMMENT: Grading weight for the credit amount (1-3)

FIELD.NAME: explanation
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional teacher explanation shown to the student in the correct-answer view

TABLE.NAME: qtype_accounting_accounts
TABLE.COMMENT: Individual accounts that make up a chart of accounts.

FIELD.NAME: chartid
FIELD.COMMENT: Foreign key references qtype_accounting_charts.id

FIELD.NAME: accountname
FIELD.COMMENT: Display name of the account (typically number + name, e.g. '1200 Bank')

FIELD.NAME: sortorder
FIELD.COMMENT: Display order within the chart

FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: Display name of the chart

FIELD.NAME: contextid
FIELD.COMMENT: Context (typically CONTEXT_COURSE) where this chart is available

FIELD.NAME: timecreated
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp when the chart was created

FIELD.NAME: timemodified
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix timestamp of the last modification

FIELD.NAME: usermodified
FIELD.COMMENT: ID of the user who last modified the chart
